name: blindspot-audit
description: Marketplace for the Blindspot Audit skill - project-level unknown-unknowns audits and durable ledger triage, for any kind of project.

plugins.name: blindspot-audit
plugins.description: Find what a project's owner is missing without knowing it: unknown unknowns, hidden risks, missing decisions, stale assumptions - across software, games, creative writing, research, content, and business projects. Keeps and triages a durable BLINDSPOT_LEDGER.md so repeat work stays focused.
